rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §30.085 concerns use of local resources for regional day schools for the deaf and does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or school district revenue calculations.
quote: Local resources shall be used to the fullest practicable extent in the establishment and operation of the regional day school programs for the deaf.
_note: Rule text contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13.
